case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. B & C IRON AND METAL CO. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: SEAWALL LOT 349, S.F. CA. (AS MORE FULLY DESCRIBED IN LEASE, EXHIBIT 1), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. ON 8/28/02. $15,212.39 RENT, $920.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $181.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,314.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED JUL-17-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT B & C IRON AND METAL CO.
